backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining data types (Task, Project, MockTest, TimelineDay, UserProfile) and CRUD operations for managing user profiles, tasks, projects, mock tests, and timeline days with in-memory storage using Maps and Lists.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting seven implemented features including Internet Identity authentication, dashboard with analytics, timeline view, daily planner, project tracker, mock test tracker, and progress tracking with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities describing their functionality including routing, authentication, UI components, data management, and visualization features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for UI elements (background, foreground, primary, secondary, borders, charts, sidebar) using oklch color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for login, dashboard, timeline, planner, projects, tests, and progress pages, all wrapped with ProtectedRoute guards and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CompletionPieCha: Recharts pie chart component visualizing completed vs pending task counts with custom colors and tooltip styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header component with mobile menu toggle, user avatar dropdown showing principal ID, and logout functionality using Internet Identity hook.
frontend/src/components/ImprovementGraph: Recharts line chart component displaying mock test score progression over time with formatted dates on x-axis and scores (0-100) on y-axis.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Reusable loading spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and optional message text using Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx: A mobile-responsive slide-out navigation menu using Sheet component that displays app navigation links with icons and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/OverviewCard.tsx: A reusable card component that displays a metric with a title, value, and customizable icon with color styling.
frontend/src/components/ProgressBar.tsx: A simple progress bar component that displays a percentage value with a visual progress indicator.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Displays project information including name, status badge, GitHub link, and tech stack tags with an edit button.
frontend/src/components/ProjectForm.tsx: A dialog form for adding/editing projects with fields for name, GitHub link, status, and tech stack management with add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProjectStatusCha: A pie chart component using Recharts to visualize project status distribution with custom colors and tooltips.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A wrapper component that checks Internet Identity authentication and redirects unauthenticated users to the home page while showing a loading spinner during initialization.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: A desktop sidebar navigation component with app branding, navigation links with icons, active route highlighting, and a motivational footer message.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A loading placeholder card component that displays skeleton UI elements while content is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Displays task details with checkbox for completion, priority badge, due date, and edit/delete action buttons with mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/TaskFilters.tsx: A filter component for tasks that provides a priority dropdown selector to filter task lists.
frontend/src/components/TaskForm.tsx: A dialog form for creating and editing tasks with fields for title, description, due date, and priority, handling both create and update mutations.
frontend/src/components/TestCard.tsx: Displays mock test information including name, score with color-coded percentage, date, and performance badge with an edit button.
frontend/src/components/TestForm.tsx: Dialog form component for adding/editing mock tests with fields for name, score (0-100), and date. Converts dates to nanoseconds and uses useAddMockTest mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/TimelineAccordio: Nested accordion component displaying timeline data organized by month and week, showing completion badges and rendering TimelineDay components for each day entry.
frontend/src/components/TimelineDay.tsx: Displays a single timeline day entry with a checkbox for completion status, formatted date, and topic badges.
Dialog form for adding timeline days with date picker and dynamic topic input that allows adding/removing multiple topics as badges.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyPerformanc: Bar chart component using Recharts to visualize weekly performance data showing completed tasks per day.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressCh: Line chart component using Recharts to display weekly progress trends of completed tasks over days.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages ICP backend actor instances based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAnalytics.ts: Computes analytics metrics from tasks including total/completed/pending counts, completion percentage, streak, and weekly completion data.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMockTests.ts: Hook that fetches all mock tests and returns them sorted by date in ascending order.
frontend/src/hooks/useProgressMetrics.ts: Aggregates metrics from tasks, projects, tests, and timeline data including completion percentages, weekly trends, project distribution, and average test scores.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Hook that fetches all projects and organizes them by status (Planning, In Progress, Completed) into a categorized object.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile, tasks, projects, mock tests, and timeline data via the backend actor. Each mutation invalidates relevant query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: Custom hook that fetches all tasks and returns them sorted by due date and priority (High, Medium, Low).
frontend/src/hooks/useTimeline.ts: Custom hook that fetches timeline data, groups it by date using a utility function, and provides a placeholder toggleComplete function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind imports, custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, and base styles for typography and layout.
frontend/src/layouts/MainLayout.tsx: Main application layout component with a desktop sidebar, mobile menu, header, and scrollable main content area.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/DailyPlanner.tsx: Daily planner page displaying filterable task cards with add/edit functionality via TaskForm dialog and empty state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page showing user welcome, overview cards for task stats and streak, overall progress bar, and weekly/completion charts.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, featuring branding, feature highlights, and automatic redirect to dashboard when authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/MockTestTracker.tsx: Mock test tracker page displaying test cards, an improvement graph, and add/edit functionality via TestForm dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressTracking.tsx: Progress tracking page showing overall completion percentage, weekly trends, project distribution charts, test score progression, and summary statistics.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectTracker.tsx: React page component that displays projects organized by status (Planning, In Progress, Completed) using tabs and cards, with functionality to add/edit projects via a modal form.
frontend/src/pages/Timeline.tsx: React page component that renders a timeline view of daily learning progress using an accordion layout, with ability to toggle completion status and add new timeline days.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: TypeScript type definitions file that re-exports backend types (Task, Project, MockTest, TimelineDay, UserProfile) and defines frontend-specific interfaces for Analytics and WeeklyData.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Utility functions for date formatting and grouping timeline data by month and week, converting bigint timestamps to readable date strings.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting percentages, priority levels, and status strings with proper capitalization.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, animations, typography, and container queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting the full-stack CSE Roadmap Tracker architecture, features, tech stack (React/Vite frontend, Spring Boot backend), and implementation status.
